creator: olivierd@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 173104
Patch to update deskutils/xfce4-notifyd

- Update to 0.3.0
- Convert to options helpers
- Sort USES

Add comment for the next upgrade of x11-toolkits/gtk30 (bug #210272).

Note: I host this tarball, because by default it is build against GTK+ >= 3.20. Upstream maintainers are aware (I think their configure.ac script is buggy).

Version of GTK+ is checked at compile time that's why if we build new tarball (from git clone) a theme directory will be missing.
